The mitochondrion is a double-membrane-bound organelle found in most eukaryotic organisms. Mitochondria generate most of the cell's supply of adenosine triphosphate (ATP), which is used as a source of chemical energy. The Krebs cycle and oxidative phosphorylation are the primary pathways through which this energy is produced in aerobic respiration, making the organelle indispensable to cellular metabolism.

The process of photosynthesis converts light energy, usually from the sun, into chemical energy that can be later released to fuel the organism's activities. This energy is stored in carbohydrate molecules, such as sugars, which are synthesized from carbon dioxide and water. Oxygen is released as a byproduct of this reaction, a fact that profoundly shaped the evolution of life on Earth and the composition of its atmosphere over billions of years.

Quantum entanglement is a phenomenon in quantum physics where two particles become interconnected such that the state of one instantaneously influences the state of the other, regardless of the distance separating them. This was famously described by Albert Einstein as "spooky action at a distance," and has since been experimentally confirmed through a series of Bell test experiments conducted over several decades by physicists around the world.

Short paragraph. Should not be simplified.

This paragraph has a nested div and should be skipped by the adapter because it contains block-level child elements which indicate it is a structural container rather than a prose paragraph suitable for simplification.

  • This navigation item text is deliberately very long indeed, well over one hundred characters, to verify that the adapter correctly skips all list items found inside a nav landmark and does not attempt to simplify them.
  • Short nav item
Financial Data
QuarterRevenueNotes
Q1 2026 $4.2M Revenue for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 exceeded analyst expectations by a significant margin, driven primarily by a surge in enterprise subscriptions and a favorable foreign-exchange rate environment that benefited international sales operations substantially.

This footer paragraph is deliberately long enough to exceed the one hundred character threshold, but it resides inside a footer element and must therefore be excluded from simplification to preserve the extension's content budget for actual article prose rather than navigational boilerplate or legal notices.

This sidebar paragraph is also quite long, definitely over one hundred characters, and should be excluded from the simplify sweep because it lives inside an aside landmark element, which is treated as boilerplate for the purposes of content budget allocation by the accessibility adapter.

  • This list item sits inside a div with role="navigation" and its text exceeds one hundred characters, so the adapter should skip it just as it skips items inside a native nav element. The selector test must not rely on the element tag alone but on the role attribute as well.
